mapper.select: SELECT d.day_id, d.day_number, TO_CHAR(d.trip_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS trip_date, d.memo AS day_memo, i.item_id, i.visit_order, i.start_time, i.end_time, i.memo, p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name FROM trip_day d LEFT JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id LEFT JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id WHERE d.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY d.day_number ASC, i.visit_order ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRIP_PLACE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO trip_place ( trip_place_id, member_id, api_place_id, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, category_name, place_url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{memberId}, #{apiContentId}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT trip_place_id FROM trip_place WHERE api_place_id = #{apiContentId} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT trip_place_id FROM trip_place WHERE place_name = #{placeName} AND address = #{address} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId}) AND (UPPER(place_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(address) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN member_id = #{currentMemberId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, 1 AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE trip_place_id = #{placeId} AND (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId})
